sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10013" key="a)ntikatolisqai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντικατ-ολισθαίνω</orth>, <sense id="n10013.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slip down correspondingly,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
